body:
## Context

All payments in the current system are manually recorded by the admin (#148, #162). Members pay via Zelle, cash, or check, then the treasurer logs it after the fact. This works but creates friction:

- Members don't know if their payment was received
- The treasurer matches Zelle transfers to families by memory or group chat screenshots
- There's no self-service — members can't initiate a payment from the portal

Online payment processors (Stripe, PayPal) charge 2.9% + 30¢ per transaction. On a $50 share, that's $1.75 lost. Across 100+ families paying monthly dues, it adds up fast. **Zelle is free, instant, and the congregation already uses it.**

## Solution

The portal becomes a **bookkeeping layer on top of free P2P payment rails** (Zelle, Venmo, Cash App). No payment processor, no fees, no PCI compliance.

### Member flow

1. Member navigates to a payment (dues, share, event charge, donation)
2. Chooses a method: **Zelle**, **Venmo**, or **Cash App**
3. Sees step-by-step instructions specific to that method:
   - **Zelle**: church email with one-tap Copy, QR code for bank app lookup
   - **Venmo**: deep link that opens the app with amount + memo pre-filled
   - **Cash App**: deep link with amount pre-filled
4. **Auto-generated reference memo** (e.g. `DUES-APR26-NIJO`, `SHARE-2026-MARY-MATHEW`) — member copies it into the payment note so the treasurer can match it
5. Member taps **"I've sent the payment"** → creates a `payments` row with `status = 'pending'`
6. Success modal shows "Pending Confirmation — usually 1–2 business days"

### Admin flow (treasurer's queue)

1. Treasurer sees a **Pending Payments** queue in the admin panel
2. Each item shows: member name, type badge, method, reference code, amount, time submitted
3. Treasurer checks the church bank account, sees the Zelle/Venmo/Cash App transfer
4. Clicks **Confirm** → status flips to `confirmed`, downstream updates fire (membership extended, share marked paid, event charge cleared)
5. Or clicks **Reject** with a note → member gets an email explaining the issue

## Schema changes

Add to `payments` table (from #148):

```sql
ALTER TABLE payments
  ADD COLUMN status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'confirmed'
    CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'confirmed', 'rejected')),
  ADD COLUMN reference_memo TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN confirmed_by UUID REFERENCES profiles(id),
  ADD COLUMN confirmed_at TIMESTAMPTZ;
```

- `status` defaults to `'confirmed'` because admin-recorded payments (cash at the door) are confirmed on creation
- Member-submitted payments start as `'pending'`
- `reference_memo` stores the auto-generated match key (e.g. `DUES-APR26-NIJO`)

## Reference memo format

Generated by the portal, deterministic per payment:

| Type | Format | Example |
|------|--------|---------|
| Membership | `DUES-{MON}{YY}-{FAMILY}` | `DUES-APR26-NIJO` |
| Share | `SHARE-{YEAR}-{NAMES}-{FAMILY}` | `SHARE-2026-MARY-JOSEPH-MATHEW` |
| Event | `EVENT-{SLUG}-{FAMILY}` | `EVENT-FAMNIGHT-JOHN` |
| Donation | `DONATE-{TYPE}-{MON}{YY}-{FAMILY}` | `DONATE-GEN-APR26-VARGHESE` |

## Deep link URLs

- **Venmo**: `https://venmo.com/u/{handle}?txn=pay&amount={amount}&note={memo}`
- **Cash App**: `https://cash.app/$tag/{amount}` (note added manually)
- **Zelle**: No API/deep link — show church email + QR code + Copy button

## Design reference

Interactive HTML mockup: [mockup-payment-flow.html](https://gist.github.com/georgenijo/4a8fec3b4dc81ffe19622fbefe17de6f)

Download and open locally to interact with:
- Click Zelle / Venmo / Cash App tabs to see per-method instructions
- Click "I've sent the payment" to see the success modal
- Scroll down past the dashed line to see the admin treasurer queue

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Member can select Zelle, Venmo, or Cash App as payment method
- [ ] Zelle: shows church email with Copy button + QR code
- [ ] Venmo: deep link opens app with amount and memo pre-filled
- [ ] Cash App: deep link opens app with amount pre-filled
- [ ] Reference memo is auto-generated and copyable
- [ ] "I've sent the payment" creates a pending payment record
- [ ] Admin sees pending payment queue with Confirm/Reject actions
- [ ] Confirm updates payment status and fires downstream side effects
- [ ] Reject sends notification email to the member
- [ ] Zero transaction fees on all paths

## Dependencies

- #148 (payments table — needs `status`, `reference_memo`, `confirmed_by`, `confirmed_at` columns)
- #154 (admin payment server actions — extend with confirm/reject)
- #155 (member portal layout)
- #159 (member payments tab — payment initiation lives here)

## Suggested sub-tickets (break out when prioritized)

1. Schema: add `status`, `reference_memo`, `confirmed_by`, `confirmed_at` to payments
2. Server actions: `submitPayment`, `confirmPayment`, `rejectPayment`
3. Zod validators for payment submission
4. Member UI: payment method selector + per-method instruction panels
5. Admin UI: pending payment queue with confirm/reject
6. Transactional emails: payment confirmed, payment rejected
title: Zero-fee payment flow: Zelle, Venmo, and Cash App integration
